heading: Consumer education materials on how to avoid scams that rely upon misleading or inaccurate caller identification information
label: 227a Consumer education materials on how to avoid scams that rely upon misleading or inaccurate caller identification information
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Repack Airwaves Yielding Better Access for Users of Modern Services Act of 2018, also known as the RAY BAUM’S Act of 2018, and as part of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2018, and not as part of the Communications Act of 1934 which comprises this chapter.
DefinitionsFor definition of “Commission” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of div. P of Pub. L. 115–141section 155a of this title

children.label: A
children.text: ways for consumers to identify scams and other fraudulent activity that rely upon the use of misleading or inaccurate caller identification information; and

children.label: B
children.text: existing technologies, if any, that a consumer can use to protect against such scams and other fraudulent activity.

children.label: i
children.text: descriptions of how a consumer can use the technologies to protect against such scams and other fraudulent activity; and

children.label: ii
children.text: details on how consumers can access and use the technologies; and

children.label: B
children.text: provide other information that may help consumers identify and avoid scams and other fraudulent activity that rely upon the use of misleading or inaccurate caller identification information.

children.heading: Updates
children.label: 3 Updates
children.text: The Commission shall ensure that the consumer education materials required under paragraph (1) are updated on a regular basis.

children.heading: Website
children.label: 4 Website
children.text: The Commission shall include the consumer education materials developed under paragraph (1) on its website.
